executive_summary: frontier-generalist-x scored 754.3/1000 (Proto-AGI Candidate) on Xodexa Hidden Official (demo), placing it at AGI Readiness Level 4 (Proto-AGI candidate). Primary gap: Generality (0.58) — competence is too narrow — it concentrates in a few families. Failure rate 18% over 180 items; 4 critical. Assessed at Proto-AGI candidate. Primary gap: Generality (0.58) — competence is too narrow — it concentrates in a few families. Most failures appear model-level — weights/training — improve via fine-tuning data and RL targets below.

agi_readiness.level_blurb: Long-horizon autonomy with limited help; good calibration & robustness.

agi_readiness.next_level_requirement: To reach Level 5 (AGI-level candidate), raise the lagging sub-scores (Grounding, Reliability, Generality) and hold them across the rotated private set.

verification_appendix.note: Signature covers the report body (excluding bulky appendices). Official scores are issued only by the central authority (authority.ScoringAuthority), never by a self-hosted runner.
